vertical_queries: {company_name} sales team hiring VP AE SDR

research_goals: Company overview: founding story, product, target market, stage
Revenue signal: ARR, MRR, customer count, growth rate indicators
Growth trajectory: funding rounds, expansion plans, new markets
Hiring needs: open sales roles, team size, hiring velocity
Competitive landscape: key competitors, market positioning, differentiation
Funding history: investors, round sizes, valuation signals
Team composition: sales team size, leadership hires, org structure
story_hooks: Growth-stage SaaS companies that nail their sales hiring in the first 90 days outperform their cohort by 2x on ARR growth.
The difference between a good quarter and a breakout quarter at your stage almost always comes down to having the right salespeople in seats — not more features.
synthesis_prompts.market_context: SaaS companies at growth stage are competing fiercely for experienced sales talent — AEs, SDRs, and VP Sales candidates who have sold into enterprise at similar price points and deal cycles.
synthesis_prompts.buyer_appetite: VC-backed SaaS companies with $5M-$50M ARR are the most active buyers of sales recruiting services, driven by board pressure to hit growth targets and the scarcity of proven enterprise sales talent.
synthesis_prompts.premium_driver: The recruiting firms commanding premium fees and retainers in SaaS share one advantage: a proprietary network of proven closers with verifiable quota attainment — not just resumes, but performance data that de-risks the hire.

buyer_scoring_criteria.score_8_description: Multiple open sales roles posted, confirmed hiring plan from leadership
buyer_scoring_criteria.score_6_description: Some hiring signals but no confirmed plan
buyer_scoring_criteria.score_4_description: No evidence of active sales hiring

buyer_scoring_criteria.score_8_description: Series A-C with recent funding, board mandate to scale sales
buyer_scoring_criteria.score_6_description: Funded but unclear sales scaling timeline
buyer_scoring_criteria.score_4_description: Pre-revenue, bootstrapped, or late-stage with stable team

buyer_scoring_criteria.score_8_description: Enterprise or mid-market SaaS with AE-driven sales motion
buyer_scoring_criteria.score_6_description: Product-led growth with emerging sales team
buyer_scoring_criteria.score_4_description: Self-serve only, no outbound sales motion

buyer_scoring_criteria.score_8_description: Hiring in markets where RevsUp has deep candidate networks
buyer_scoring_criteria.score_6_description: Remote-first but willing to consider RevsUp's candidate pool
buyer_scoring_criteria.score_4_description: Hiring in markets with no RevsUp coverage

growth_levers.description: NRR above 120% signals product-market fit and expansion revenue that drives premium ARR multiples.
Quota attainment, ramp time, and AE productivity metrics determine how efficiently growth capital converts to ARR.
Deal cycle compression and conversion rates from SDR-sourced pipeline are the leading indicators of scalable revenue.
Category leaders or creators command 2-3x the multiples of fast-followers in the same market.
Diversified customer bases with no single customer above 10% of ARR reduce risk premiums and increase acquirer confidence.

fee_structure.success_fee_description: 20-25% of first-year OTE for contingent placements

pipeline_prompts.synthesis_context: You are a sales recruiting specialist evaluating {buyer_name} as a potential client for RevsUp's sales talent placement services. You are writing intelligence about their hiring needs and sales team structure.
pipeline_prompts.nuggets_context: You are extracting hiring intelligence from RAW search results about {buyer_name} for a sales recruiting firm.
pipeline_prompts.nuggets_focus: Why {buyer_name} needs to hire sales talent and what kind of candidates they need
pipeline_prompts.product_discovery_query: {buyer_name} is a SaaS or technology company actively hiring sales representatives, account executives, or sales leadership

pipeline_sections.title: Active Hiring Needs
pipeline_sections.topic_template: {buyer_name} has open sales positions including account executives, SDRs, sales managers, or VP Sales roles

pipeline_sections.title: Growth Stage & Funding
pipeline_sections.topic_template: {buyer_name} has raised venture funding and is scaling their go-to-market team to hit growth targets

pipeline_sections.title: Sales Model & Team Structure
pipeline_sections.topic_template: {buyer_name} uses an enterprise or mid-market sales model with dedicated AEs, SDRs, and sales leadership

pipeline_sections.title: CEO Vision & Growth Plans
pipeline_sections.topic_template: {buyer_name} CEO or leadership has discussed plans to scale sales, expand into new markets, or accelerate revenue growth

pipeline_sections.title: Approach Strategy
pipeline_sections.topic_template: VP Sales, Head of Talent, or hiring managers at {buyer_name} who make recruiting vendor decisions

pipeline_sections.title: Golden Nuggets
pipeline_sections.topic_template: {buyer_name} leadership has made statements about sales hiring challenges, team scaling, or the importance of recruiting in their growth strategy
